coding.display: Colonoscopy, flexible; diagnostic, including collection of specimen(s) by brushing or washing, when performed (separate procedure)

encounter.display: Ambulatory endoscopy visit, 2024-09-17, Breadth Test Endoscopy Suite

coding.display: Screening for malignant neoplasm of large intestine (procedure)

outcome.text: Completed to cecum; two diminutive polyps removed; recommend repeat in 10 years

note.text: Cecal intubation achieved at 9 minutes. Boston Bowel Prep Score 8/9. Two 3 mm sessile polyps in the sigmoid colon removed by cold snare and sent to pathology. Patient tolerated the procedure well under moderate sedation and was discharged with standard post-endoscopy instructions, including resuming regular diet this evening and avoiding driving for 24 hours. This deliberately long note exists so the renderer is exercised against multi-sentence narrative content that must wrap across several lines without truncation.
